title: ジャパンCの後に・25光年を超えて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega rises to the top, sweeping the fierce
international competition and toppling the
Centurial Overlord and Doto's raging tempest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Narita Top Road vows to make a
comeback and beat Admire Vega herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega returns to me, the trainer who chose
to follow her, as an unrivaled first-magnitude star.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remarks how I've always been there for her,
with the faintest of smiles on her face.
